bodyText:
HEADING1:GST Revocation of Cancellation | Virtual Auditor

What is GST Revocation of Cancellation | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

GST registration revocation application. Suo motu cancellation reversal. Section 30 CGST Act, Form GST REG-21. Deadline-critical service.
Virtual Auditor provides professional gst revocation of cancellation | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.

Our practice handles GST registration revocation proceedings under Section 30 of the CGST Act. When registration is cancelled suo motu by the department for non-filing of returns, the taxpayer can apply for revocation within 90 days (extendable). Our services include: filing all pending returns (GSTR-3B, GSTR-1) with applicable late fees, preparation of revocation application on GST portal, representation before the proper officer, and appeal before Appellate Authority if revocation is rejected. We have successfully revoked cancellations for 200+ businesses. Timely action is critical as the deadline is non-extendable beyond the prescribed period.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
